name: pandas-documentation-search
title: Pandas Documentation Search
description: Quickly search through official Pandas documentation
author: FariaF22

commands.name: pandas-docs
commands.title: Pandas Docs
commands.subtitle: Search through Pandas documentation
commands.description: Search Pandas API reference and preview documentation inside Raycast.

preferences.name: useShortPrefix
preferences.title: Use Common Aliases
preferences.label: Use pd, df, s, and arr aliases
preferences.description: Use common aliases in displayed symbols (for example, pandas->pd, DataFrame->df, Series->s, array(s)->arr).

preferences.name: hideApiItems
preferences.title: Hide API Items
preferences.label: Hide symbols starting with 'api'
preferences.description: Hide entries whose symbol path starts with 'api' (for example, 'api.types.is_numeric_dtype').

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
